response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in web, mobile, and full-stack software development with limited exposure to hardware-software co-design, GPU architectures, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, making them a poor fit despite strong general engineering skills.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and contribute to open-source tools and infrastructure
Demonstrated expertise in performance-critical systems (e.g., low-latency DLang apps)
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling experience
Lacks documented work in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
No background in hardware-software co-design or system-on-chip performance analysis
